final:
module RefModule(
  input clk_in,
  input enable,
  output clk_out
  );// Use a generic clock buffer instead of BUFGCTRL as it may be not defined in your environment
  wire __enable_tmp = (enable);
  assign clk_out = __enable_tmp ? clk_in : 1'b0; // Assuming you want to output clk_in when enabled, else 0

endmodule
